title: matelea wootonii
intro: Matelea wootonii, also known as Coralberry vine or Coral Milkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to induce sweating and relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and bronchitis. The health benefits of Matelea wootonii include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe sore throats and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an expectorant to aid in the removal of mucus. Herbal preparations of Matelea wootonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of upper respiratory tract infections.
